intro: Over the past two weeks, ZCyberNews has tracked eight espionage-focused reports, with six rated high severity and two critical. APT28 (Fancy Bear), Mustang Panda, and Silver Dragon were the most frequently observed threat actors, targeting government, healthcare, technology, banking, and critical infrastructure sectors. Affected regions included Europe, Global, India, South Korea, and Southeast Asia, with incidents recorded between April 12 and April 27, 2026.
